## Week in Review: 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-19

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 6.0.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.0 (+16.7% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.05)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 1.9 (+85.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.12)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.0 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 6.0 (+20.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.21)
